location.address: Alsheikh Zayed- district 7 - CMC zayed -second floor- clinic n.12

doctor.name: Dr. Mostafa Ezzat
doctor.title: Licensed Physical Therapist
doctor.bio: Dr. Mostafa Ezzat specializes in restoring functional movement, alleviating pain, and enabling patients to achieve optimal physical performance through evidence-based rehabilitation protocols. Combining expertise in modern therapeutic techniques with a patient-centered methodology, Dr. Ezzat has successfully guided hundreds of patients toward comprehensive recovery.
doctor.expertise: With specialized training in sports injury rehabilitation, post-surgical recovery, chronic pain management, and occupational rehabilitation, Dr. Ezzat integrates traditional therapeutic wisdom with cutting-edge clinical innovations to deliver measurable therapeutic outcomes.

hero.title: Physio-Raise
hero.subtitle: Advanced Physical Therapy & Rehabilitation
hero.tagline: Personalized care. Precise recovery. Real results.
